heading: “Eligible agency” defined
label: 796f–5 “Eligible agency” defined
text: As used in this subpart, the term “eligible agency” means a consumer-controlled, community-based, cross-disability, nonresidential private nonprofit agency.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 796f–5, , as added , , , defined “eligible agency”, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 93–112, title VII, § 726Pub. L. 102–569, title VII, § 701(2)106 Stat. 4464Pub. L. 105–220Oct. 29, 1992
